name: 06-20-frontend-subagent-drawer-failed-banner
title: FT-F-005 — SubagentDrawer failed state 视觉强化
description: SubagentDrawer 在 worker failed / cancelled 时缺明显失败横幅(2026-06-20 截图分析 D2):截图里 drawer 头部只有 'failed at 14281.9s' 红色 badge + summary,但失败原因(最后一次 tool error / cancelled-by-user)无独立 banner,跟 running 状态视觉差异不够。用户读不到 '这次 worker 失败是因为 X'。DEBT.md FT-F-005。
creator: Carlos-home
